Home/Agents/Voice AI/Outbound Follow-Up Agent
Voice AI Agent

Outbound Follow-Up Agent

An Outbound Follow-Up Agent calls every new lead within 5 minutes of form submission, qualifies them with 3–4 questions, and books meetings only for leads who are ready to buy. Your sales team stops wasting time on cold discovery.

Starting at
₹2L–4L setup + ₹30k/mo $4k–8k setup + $600/mo
Languages
Hindi · English · Tamil · Telugu
Built For
Real estateEdTechB2B SaaSFinancial servicesCoaching & consulting

How it works.

01

Lead submits a form

Website, Facebook Lead Ads, IndiaMart, JustDial — any source with a webhook.

02

Agent calls within 5 minutes

'Hi, this is Aria from [Company]. You just enquired about [product] — got 2 minutes?'

03

Qualification

3–4 questions covering budget, timeline, situation, authority. Logged in CRM in real time.

04

Outcome

Hot lead → calendar booked. Not ready → nurture sequence. No answer → 3 retries + WhatsApp.

ROI Math
Without

BDE doing follow-up: 30–40 calls/day, 30–40% connect rate, 4–8 hour response time.

→
With Amoris

Outbound Agent: 300+ calls/day, calls within 5 minutes, consistent qualification messaging.

78% of deals go to the vendor who responds first. This agent always responds first.

FAQ

Common questions about Outbound Follow-Up Agent.

How fast does the agent call after a lead fills a form?
Under 5 minutes. The agent triggers on a webhook from your lead source and calls within minutes of form submission. Most competitors take 4–8 hours. Speed-to-lead is the single biggest factor in conversion.
What does the agent say on the call?
It introduces itself as an AI assistant for your company, references what the lead enquired about, asks 3–4 qualification questions, and either books a meeting or marks the lead as unqualified. The script is written with you during setup.
What if the lead doesn't pick up?
The agent retries 3 times over 90 minutes (5 min, 30 min, 90 min), then sends a WhatsApp message, then marks for manual follow-up.
Will leads know they're talking to AI?
The agent discloses it's an AI assistant for your company. Leads who proceed past disclosure are higher quality.
What CRM does it push data to?
Zoho CRM, HubSpot, Salesforce, or a Google Sheet. Every call logged with duration, qualification status, and a call summary.

Ready to deploy Outbound Follow-Up Agent?

Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll scope your use case and give you a cost on the call.
